title: fagus purpurea
intro: Fagus purpurea, also known as purple beech, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fagus purpurea include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Fagus purpurea is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some using it in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
